name: @yya007/skill-finder
description: Universal agent skill discovery — search 14,000+ curated agent skills from all major registries using natural language. Runs entirely locally via FAISS. No API calls, no latency.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "var m='
=== SkillFinder installed ===

Finish setup (run once):
  1. pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt
  2. ollama pull qwen3-embedding:0.6b
  3. python scripts/update_index.py

Then ask your agent: 'find a skill for X'
'; process.stdout.write(m)"
